baseline.approver: TMCO Consulting, LLC — Build Week Demo Authority
baseline.benchmark: CIS Apple macOS 26 Tahoe Benchmark Level 1
limitations: This internal demo approval is not CIS, NIST, DoD, C3PAO, or assessor certification.
Only explicitly mapped settings are automatically evaluated.
iOS and iPadOS are outside this macOS baseline and are not scored against it.
Organizational, procedural, interview, and assessor evidence remain required.
baseline.name: TMCO Consulting macOS CIS Level 1 Demo Baseline
